overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a cowboy character walking along a desert riverbank during golden hour. The character moves steadily through shallow water at the edge of a river surrounded by red rock formations and sandstone cliffs.

agents.ego_description: cowboy character walking steadily along the river's edge through shallow water

entered.detail: calm shallow river with gentle ripples reflecting the sunset
low green bushes and desert vegetation lining the sandy bank
wet sand and silt at the water's edge where the character walks
large reddish-brown rock formation rising from the desert floor

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a desert riverbank during golden hour. The cowboy character walks through shallow water along the sandy shore, with desert scrub vegetation on the left and calm river waters extending to the right. A large red rock formation looms ahead on the left while the sun sits low on the horizon ahead.

events.description: character passes the red rock outcrop on the left, revealing open desert beyond
sandstone cliff face becomes visible on the right side of the river

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the riverbank, moving past rock formations

entered.detail: tall layered red sandstone cliff face rising from the river's edge

segments.scene_description: The character moves past the scrub vegetation and red rock formation, entering a more open section of the riverbank. A massive sandstone cliff becomes visible on the right side of the river, while the water grows slightly deeper. The landscape opens up ahead toward a distant canyon.

scene_state.functional_zone: deep river channel with cliff walls

events.description: water depth increases significantly, becoming darker and more reflective

agents.ego_description: walking through deeper water along the shoreline, approaching the cliff face

entered.detail: opening of a canyon visible in the distance ahead

segments.scene_description: In the final segment, the character walks through noticeably deeper water as the sandstone cliff looms large on the right. The river channel narrows slightly with the cliff face now dominating the right side of the frame. The sun continues to cast long shadows and warm light across the water and rock surfaces.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a desert riverbank that transitions from an open sandy shore into a narrow canyon corridor. It begins with a cowboy walking through shallow water beside desert scrub, moving toward a large red rock formation under a low-hanging sun. As the character passes the rock formation, the landscape opens up to reveal a massive sandstone cliff rising on the right side of the river. The scene then shifts as the water grows deeper and the river channel narrows, bringing the towering cliff face into dominant view. Finally, the camera continues forward through the deepening current while the golden hour light casts long, warm shadows across the surrounding rock surfaces.
